description_long: This object consists of two open cardboard trays, each containing multiple individually packaged snack items arranged in a grid. The packaging on top of each snack is orange and white, with the word 'RAMENS' clearly printed in large letters, suggesting instant ramen noodle cups. The trays are made of brown corrugated cardboard, with the sides cut low to display the tops and partial sides of the snack packages. The snack packages themselves are cylindrical, with visible white tops and orange printed branding. The trays are partially open, with one tray missing a snack in the front left corner, revealing the interior. The overall appearance is that of a bulk retail or wholesale snack display, suitable for placement in a store, convenience shop, or urban food distribution setting.
description: Two open cardboard trays filled with orange and white 'RAMENS' snack cups, arranged in neat rows for retail display.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the orange 'RAMENS' branding on the snack cup lids and the open cardboard trays, with one cup missing in the left tray.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the cylindrical shape of the snack cups and the low-cut sides of the cardboard trays.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the trays and the uniform arrangement of the snack cups, with branding still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the cylindrical snack cups and the open tray design, with the missing cup area visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'RAMENS' is printed in large, bold letters on the orange and white lids of each snack cup, located on the top surface of each package. The logo is simple, with no additional graphics visible.
attribute_packaging_type: cardboard tray with individual plastic/paper snack cups
attribute_flavor_indication: The packaging is orange and white, but no explicit flavor text or graphics are visible.
